meta.name: Design Guidelines v5
meta.description: An ultra-minimal light design system built on whitespace, thin rules, restrained tone, and product-book composition.

display.usage: Hero statements, minimal section titles, and key product labels.

body.usage: Body text, navigation, controls, and system detail.

layoutRules: Let whitespace and thin dividers do most of the work.
Use very few filled surfaces and reserve them for places where structure would otherwise collapse.
Treat the page like a product book, not a dashboard theme.
Reference extreme minimalism without copying OpenAI's exact rhythm or styling language.

rules: prefer opacity and border shifts over lift

dashboardFit.tradeoff: The cleanest and quietest option, but it depends on strong content hierarchy because the styling is intentionally restrained.
